deviations.description: The process model enforces that both 'Perform Physical Examination' and 'Draw Blood Samples' (blood test) precede 'Make Diagnosis', which is stricter than the new requirement that permits a diagnosis without these prior activities.
process_model_reference: Perform Physical Examination, Draw Blood Samples, Make Diagnosis

deviations.description: The process model maintains the order that 'Perform Physical Examination' must precede 'Make Diagnosis', which exceeds the new requirement that only requires the existence of a diagnosis activity.
The process model maintains the order that 'Draw Blood Samples' (blood test) must precede 'Make Diagnosis', which exceeds the new requirement that only requires the existence of a diagnosis activity.
